entries.name: Agent Operator
entries.description: Runs or hosts an agent runtime and may attest operational, mandate-compliance, or incident evidence.

entries.name: Principal
entries.description: Entity on whose behalf an agent may act and that may issue mandate or delegation credentials.

entries.name: Controller
entries.description: Entity controlling agent profile lifecycle, keys, and administrative policy.

entries.name: Merchant
entries.description: Provides goods, services, content, APIs, or agent work outputs and may attest fulfillment.

entries.name: API Provider
entries.description: Offers paid or metered APIs and may attest access, usage, settlement, or policy outcomes.

entries.name: Content Provider
entries.description: Offers paid or licensed content and may attest access or license compliance.

entries.name: Payment Processor
entries.description: Processes or observes payment authorization, settlement, failure, refund, reversal, or chargeback outcomes.

entries.name: Wallet Provider
entries.description: Provides wallet, custody, signing, or policy-controlled payment infrastructure.

entries.name: Agent Marketplace
entries.description: Lists, brokers, or settles work between agents, principals, merchants, and counterparties.

entries.name: Auditor
entries.description: Reviews controls, security posture, conformance, or evidence and may issue certifications.

entries.name: Security Incident Reporter
entries.description: Reports, validates, rejects, or updates security incidents affecting agents or peers.

entries.name: Dispute Arbiter
entries.description: Resolves disputed AFT events, payments, obligations, incidents, or reputation-impacting reports.

entries.name: Credit Provider
entries.description: Extends credit or evaluates creditworthiness for agents or principals.

entries.name: Insurer
entries.description: Offers coverage, guarantees, or claims processing for agent financial activity.

entries.name: Reputation Provider
entries.description: Computes contextual risk or reputation views from signed evidence, credentials, and policies.

entries.name: Anchor Provider
entries.description: Batches and anchors AFT commitments on public chains, L2s, permissioned DLTs, or consortium ledgers.

entries.name: Registry Maintainer
entries.description: Maintains versioned AFT registries for peer types, event types, algorithms, and conformance profiles.

entries.name: Conformance Tester
entries.description: Runs AFT conformance tests and may issue signed conformance reports or credentials.

entries.name: Event Issuer
entries.description: Peer capability indicating that the peer emits signed AFT events within a declared evidence scope.

entries.name: Event Verifier
entries.description: Peer capability indicating that the peer verifies signed AFT events, attestations, credentials, or anchors.
